channel.title: AD Daily — Alzheimer's Biomarkers & Therapeutics
channel.description: An automated daily audio brief on neurodegenerative-disease biomarkers and treatments, generated from AlzForum and the Alzheimer's & Dementia journal.
channel.itunes:author: AD Daily (automated)
